issues.message: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.

actual.error: s_curve_riser relative first waypoint must advance along the incoming tangent before the lateral freeform turn; axial projection is -9.97188 mm; s_curve_riser relative first waypoint is too close/off-axis for a regular tangent entry: its circular-entry radius is 9.97244 mm but at least 10.5 mm is required. Move the first anchor farther along the incoming tangent before turning; s_curve_riser relative waypoint chain is curvature-infeasible for the supported tangent-continuous spline: its predicted minimum curvature radius is 0.62117 mm but at least 10.5 mm is required after deterministic handle optimization (factors [0.55, 0.55, 0.4, 0.4]). Redistribute or add well-separated relative anchors so each direction change is spread over more distance; sequential heading contradiction at outward_bend: turn.plane_normal must be perpendicular to the incoming tangent; absolute dot product is 0.666667

next_actions: Fix INTENT_EXTRACTION_FAILED: Gemini did not return a usable production intent.
